---
title: "Experiment 3"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
# Packages
library(lme4)
library(stats)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(lmerTest)  
test_df <- read.csv(file.path("data","exp3_data.csv"))
test_df <- test_df[test_df$"timeout" < 1, ]
```

```{r}

y_cols <- c(
  "submitted_path_reveal_spearman_abs",
  "submitted_path_reveal_kendall_abs",
  "submitted_path_reveal_mean_excess_jump_distance"
)

for (y_col in y_cols) {

  df <- test_df %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[y_col]]),
      !is.na(submitted_path_reveal_count),
      !is.na(is_reuse),
      !is.na(subject_idx)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      subject_idx = factor(subject_idx),
      submitted_path_reveal_count_f = factor(submitted_path_reveal_count)
    )

  res <- lmer(
    as.formula(
      paste0(
        y_col,
        " ~ is_reuse + submitted_path_reveal_count_f + ",
        "(1 + is_reuse || subject_idx)"
      )
    ),
    data = df,
    REML = FALSE,
    control = lmerControl(
      optimizer = "bobyqa",
      optCtrl = list(maxfun = 1e5)
    )
  )

  cat("\n", strrep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
  cat(y_col, "\n")
  cat(strrep("=", 80), "\n", sep = "")
  print(summary(res))
}
```



# 5-fold CV between participants
```{r}


mse <- function(y, yhat) mean((y - yhat)^2)

make_random_folds <- function(n, K = 5, seed = 0) {
  set.seed(seed)
  idx <- sample(seq_len(n))
  split(idx, rep(1:K, length.out = n))
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Stable reveal-count dummy columns
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

add_reveal_count_dummy_cols <- function(
    df,
    count_col = "submitted_path_reveal_count",
    prefix = "reveal_count"
) {
  out <- df

  out[[count_col]] <- as.numeric(out[[count_col]])
  count_levels <- sort(unique(out[[count_col]][!is.na(out[[count_col]])]))

  if (length(count_levels) <= 1) {
    return(list(
      df = out,
      dummy_cols = character(0),
      ref_level = ifelse(length(count_levels) == 0, NA, count_levels[1])
    ))
  }

  ref_level <- count_levels[1]
  dummy_cols <- character(0)

  for (level in count_levels[-1]) {
    if (level == as.integer(level)) {
      level_str <- as.character(as.integer(level))
    } else {
      level_str <- gsub("\\.", "_", as.character(level))
    }

    col <- paste0(prefix, "_", level_str)
    out[[col]] <- as.integer(out[[count_col]] == level)
    dummy_cols <- c(dummy_cols, col)
  }

  cat("Reveal-count reference level:", ref_level, "\n")
  cat("Reveal-count dummy cols:", paste(dummy_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")

  list(df = out, dummy_cols = dummy_cols, ref_level = ref_level)
}

make_group_folds <- function(groups, K = 5, seed = 0) {
  set.seed(seed)

  groups <- unique(as.character(groups))
  groups <- sample(groups)

  if (length(groups) < K) {
    stop(sprintf("Number of groups (%d) is smaller than K (%d).", length(groups), K))
  }

  split(groups, rep(seq_len(K), length.out = length(groups)))
}


# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Between-participant CV wrapper for LME
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cv_lme_group_kfold_reveal <- function(
    df,
    response,
    group,
    fixed_formula,
    random_spec,
    K = 5,
    seed = 0,
    optimizer = "bobyqa"
) {
  if (!is.numeric(df[[response]])) {
    stop(sprintf("%s must be numeric for LME.", response))
  }

  df[[group]] <- as.factor(df[[group]])

  fml <- as.formula(
    paste0(response, " ~ ", fixed_formula, " + ", random_spec)
  )

  # Optional full-data fit, still useful for coefficient summary / AIC / BIC
  fit_full <- suppressWarnings(
    lmer(
      fml,
      data = df,
      control = lmerControl(
        optimizer = optimizer,
        optCtrl = list(maxfun = 1e5)
      ),
      REML = FALSE
    )
  )

  group_folds <- make_group_folds(df[[group]], K = K, seed = seed)

  rows <- vector("list", K)

  for (k in seq_len(K)) {
    test_groups <- group_folds[[k]]

    te_idx <- which(as.character(df[[group]]) %in% test_groups)
    tr_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(df)), te_idx)

    train <- droplevels(df[tr_idx, , drop = FALSE])
    test  <- df[te_idx, , drop = FALSE]

    # Keep held-out subject IDs as legitimate new levels.
    # Do NOT coerce them to the training levels only, because that turns them into NA.
    test[[group]] <- factor(
      as.character(test[[group]]),
      levels = union(levels(train[[group]]), unique(as.character(test[[group]])))
    )

    fit_k <- suppressWarnings(
      lmer(
        fml,
        data = train,
        control = lmerControl(
          optimizer = optimizer,
          optCtrl = list(maxfun = 1e5)
        ),
        REML = FALSE
      )
    )

    y_test <- test[[response]]

    # Between-participant generalization:
    # all test participants are unseen, so use fixed effects only.
    yhat <- suppressWarnings(
      predict(
        fit_k,
        newdata = test,
        re.form = NA,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      )
    )

    rows[[k]] <- data.frame(
      fold = k,
      n_train = nrow(train),
      n_test = nrow(test),
      n_train_subjects = dplyr::n_distinct(train[[group]]),
      n_test_subjects = dplyr::n_distinct(test[[group]]),
      n_with_RE = 0,
      n_FE_only = nrow(test),
      test_mse = mse(y_test, yhat)
    )
  }

  out <- do.call(rbind, rows)

  list(
    cv_table = out,
    cv_avg_mse = mean(out$test_mse),
    fit_full = fit_full,
    formula = fml,
    cv_type = "between-participant grouped K-fold"
  )
}


run_lme_reveal_count_adjusted_cv <- function(
    tmp,
    y_col = "submitted_path_reveal_spearman_abs",
    count_col = "submitted_path_reveal_count",
    group_col = "subject_idx",
    K = 5,
    seed = 0,
    random_slope_full = TRUE,
    optimizer = "bobyqa"
) {
  df <- tmp

  if (!("is_reuse" %in% names(df))) {
    df <- df %>%
      mutate(is_reuse = as.integer(submitted_equals_any_cached_solution))
  }

  df <- df %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[y_col]]),
      !is.na(.data[[count_col]]),
      !is.na(is_reuse),
      !is.na(.data[[group_col]])
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      subject_idx = factor(.data[[group_col]])
    )

  # Add stable dummy columns before folds are created
  dummy_obj <- add_reveal_count_dummy_cols(
    df,
    count_col = count_col,
    prefix = "reveal_count"
  )

  df <- dummy_obj$df
  count_dummy_cols <- dummy_obj$dummy_cols

  if (length(count_dummy_cols) > 0) {
    count_terms <- paste(count_dummy_cols, collapse = " + ")

    fixed_formula_full <- paste0("is_reuse + ", count_terms)
    fixed_formula_count_only <- count_terms
  } else {
    fixed_formula_full <- "is_reuse"
    fixed_formula_count_only <- "1"
  }

  if (random_slope_full) {
    random_spec_full <- paste0("(1 + is_reuse || ", group_col, ")")
  } else {
    random_spec_full <- paste0("(1 | ", group_col, ")")
  }

  random_spec_count_only <- paste0("(1 | ", group_col, ")")

  cat("\n", strrep("=", 90), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("Count-adjusted LME CV:", y_col, "\n")
  cat(strrep("=", 90), "\n", sep = "")

  cat("Full fixed formula:       ", fixed_formula_full, "\n")
  cat("Full random spec:         ", random_spec_full, "\n")
  cat("Count-only fixed formula: ", fixed_formula_count_only, "\n")
  cat("Count-only random spec:   ", random_spec_count_only, "\n")
  cat("CV settings: between-participant grouped K-fold; K = ", K,
    ", seed = ", seed, ", loss = MSE\n", sep = "")
  cat("N rows after dropna:", nrow(df), "\n")
  cat("N subjects:", n_distinct(df[[group_col]]), "\n")

  # ------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Full model
  # ------------------------------------------------------------------

  cv_full <- cv_lme_group_kfold_reveal(
    df = df,
    response = y_col,
    group = group_col,
    fixed_formula = fixed_formula_full,
    random_spec = random_spec_full,
    K = K,
    seed = seed,
    optimizer = optimizer
  )

  # ------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Count-only control model
  # ------------------------------------------------------------------

  cv_count <- cv_lme_group_kfold_reveal(
    df = df,
    response = y_col,
    group = group_col,
    fixed_formula = fixed_formula_count_only,
    random_spec = random_spec_count_only,
    K = K,
    seed = seed,
    optimizer = optimizer
  )

  cat("\n--- Full model ---\n")
  print(summary(cv_full$fit_full))

  cat("\n--- Count-only control model ---\n")
  print(summary(cv_count$fit_full))

  cat("\n--- In-sample information criteria ---\n")
  cat(sprintf("AIC full:       %.2f\n", AIC(cv_full$fit_full)))
  cat(sprintf("AIC count-only: %.2f\n", AIC(cv_count$fit_full)))
  cat(sprintf(
    "Delta AIC count-only - full: %.2f\n",
    AIC(cv_count$fit_full) - AIC(cv_full$fit_full)
  ))

  cat(sprintf("BIC full:       %.2f\n", BIC(cv_full$fit_full)))
  cat(sprintf("BIC count-only: %.2f\n", BIC(cv_count$fit_full)))
  cat(sprintf(
    "Delta BIC count-only - full: %.2f\n",
    BIC(cv_count$fit_full) - BIC(cv_full$fit_full)
  ))

  # ------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Compare fold-level CV MSE
  # ------------------------------------------------------------------

  cv_compare <- cv_full$cv_table %>%
  select(
    fold,
    full_n_train = n_train,
    full_n_test = n_test,
    full_n_train_subjects = n_train_subjects,
    full_n_test_subjects = n_test_subjects,
    full_n_with_RE = n_with_RE,
    full_n_FE_only = n_FE_only,
    full_mse = test_mse
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    cv_count$cv_table %>%
      select(
        fold,
        count_only_n_train = n_train,
        count_only_n_test = n_test,
        count_only_n_train_subjects = n_train_subjects,
        count_only_n_test_subjects = n_test_subjects,
        count_only_n_with_RE = n_with_RE,
        count_only_n_FE_only = n_FE_only,
        count_only_mse = test_mse
      ),
    by = "fold"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    count_only_minus_full = count_only_mse - full_mse
  )

  cat("\n--- Fold-level CV losses ---\n")
  print(cv_compare)

  cat(sprintf("\nMean CV MSE full:       %.6f\n", cv_full$cv_avg_mse))
  cat(sprintf("Mean CV MSE count-only: %.6f\n", cv_count$cv_avg_mse))
  cat(sprintf(
    "Delta CV MSE count-only - full: %.6f\n",
    cv_count$cv_avg_mse - cv_full$cv_avg_mse
  ))

  valid_diff <- cv_compare$count_only_minus_full
  valid_diff <- valid_diff[!is.na(valid_diff)]

  if (length(valid_diff) >= 2) {
    cv_t <- t.test(valid_diff, mu = 0)

    cat(sprintf(
      "Fold-wise t-test on count-only - full MSE: t = %.4f, p = %.6g, n_folds = %d\n",
      unname(cv_t$statistic),
      cv_t$p.value,
      length(valid_diff)
    ))
  } else {
    cv_t <- NULL
    cat("Fold-wise t-test unavailable: too few valid folds.\n")
  }

  list(
    df_used = df,
    count_dummy_cols = count_dummy_cols,
    fixed_formula_full = fixed_formula_full,
    fixed_formula_count_only = fixed_formula_count_only,
    random_spec_full = random_spec_full,
    random_spec_count_only = random_spec_count_only,
    cv_full = cv_full,
    cv_count = cv_count,
    comparison = cv_compare,
    full_mean_mse = cv_full$cv_avg_mse,
    count_only_mean_mse = cv_count$cv_avg_mse,
    cv_ttest = cv_t
  )
}



```


```{r}

y_cols <- c(
  "submitted_path_reveal_spearman_abs",
  "submitted_path_reveal_kendall_abs",
  "submitted_path_reveal_mean_excess_jump_distance"
)

cv_results_by_metric_between_subj <- list()

for (y_col in y_cols) {
  cv_results_by_metric_between_subj[[y_col]] <- run_lme_reveal_count_adjusted_cv(
    tmp = test_df,
    y_col = y_col,
    count_col = "submitted_path_reveal_count",
    group_col = "subject_idx",
    K = 5,
    seed = 0,
    random_slope_full = TRUE,
    optimizer = "bobyqa"
  )
}

cv_summary_between_subj <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(cv_results_by_metric_between_subj), function(y_col) {
    cv <- cv_results_by_metric_between_subj[[y_col]]
    comp <- cv$comparison

    data.frame(
      metric = y_col,
      cv_type = "between_participant_grouped_5fold",

      full_mean_cv_mse = cv$full_mean_mse,
      count_only_mean_cv_mse = cv$count_only_mean_mse,
      count_only_minus_full = cv$count_only_mean_mse - cv$full_mean_mse,

      n_valid_folds = sum(!is.na(comp$count_only_minus_full)),

      mean_full_test_subjects = mean(comp$full_n_test_subjects, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_count_only_test_subjects = mean(comp$count_only_n_test_subjects, na.rm = TRUE),

      foldwise_t = ifelse(
        is.null(cv$cv_ttest),
        NA_real_,
        unname(cv$cv_ttest$statistic)
      ),
      foldwise_p = ifelse(
        is.null(cv$cv_ttest),
        NA_real_,
        cv$cv_ttest$p.value
      )
    )
  })
)

print(cv_summary_between_subj)
```




# 5-fold CV between participants, without reveal_count adjustment
```{r}

mse <- function(y, yhat) mean((y - yhat)^2)

make_group_folds <- function(groups, K = 5, seed = 0) {
  set.seed(seed)

  groups <- unique(as.character(groups))
  groups <- sample(groups)

  if (length(groups) < K) {
    stop(sprintf("Number of groups (%d) is smaller than K (%d).", length(groups), K))
  }

  split(groups, rep(seq_len(K), length.out = length(groups)))
}


# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Between-participant CV wrapper for LME
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cv_lme_group_kfold <- function(
    df,
    response,
    group,
    fixed_formula,
    random_spec,
    K = 5,
    seed = 0,
    optimizer = "bobyqa"
) {
  if (!is.numeric(df[[response]])) {
    stop(sprintf("%s must be numeric for LME.", response))
  }

  df[[group]] <- as.factor(df[[group]])

  fml <- as.formula(
    paste0(response, " ~ ", fixed_formula, " + ", random_spec)
  )

  # Optional full-data fit, useful for coefficient summary / AIC / BIC
  fit_full <- suppressWarnings(
    lmer(
      fml,
      data = df,
      control = lmerControl(
        optimizer = optimizer,
        optCtrl = list(maxfun = 1e5)
      ),
      REML = FALSE
    )
  )

  group_folds <- make_group_folds(df[[group]], K = K, seed = seed)

  rows <- vector("list", K)

  for (k in seq_len(K)) {
    test_groups <- group_folds[[k]]

    te_idx <- which(as.character(df[[group]]) %in% test_groups)
    tr_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(df)), te_idx)

    train <- droplevels(df[tr_idx, , drop = FALSE])
    test  <- df[te_idx, , drop = FALSE]

    # Keep held-out subject IDs as legitimate new levels.
    test[[group]] <- factor(
      as.character(test[[group]]),
      levels = union(levels(train[[group]]), unique(as.character(test[[group]])))
    )

    fit_k <- suppressWarnings(
      lmer(
        fml,
        data = train,
        control = lmerControl(
          optimizer = optimizer,
          optCtrl = list(maxfun = 1e5)
        ),
        REML = FALSE
      )
    )

    y_test <- test[[response]]

    # Between-participant generalization:
    # all test participants are unseen, so use fixed effects only.
    yhat <- suppressWarnings(
      predict(
        fit_k,
        newdata = test,
        re.form = NA,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      )
    )

    rows[[k]] <- data.frame(
      fold = k,
      n_train = nrow(train),
      n_test = nrow(test),
      n_train_subjects = dplyr::n_distinct(train[[group]]),
      n_test_subjects = dplyr::n_distinct(test[[group]]),
      n_with_RE = 0,
      n_FE_only = nrow(test),
      test_mse = mse(y_test, yhat)
    )
  }

  out <- do.call(rbind, rows)

  list(
    cv_table = out,
    cv_avg_mse = mean(out$test_mse),
    fit_full = fit_full,
    formula = fml,
    cv_type = "between-participant grouped K-fold"
  )
}


run_lme_no_reveal_count_cv <- function(
    tmp,
    y_col = "submitted_path_reveal_spearman_abs",
    group_col = "subject_idx",
    K = 5,
    seed = 0,
    random_slope_target = TRUE,
    optimizer = "bobyqa"
) {
  df <- tmp

  if (!("is_reuse" %in% names(df))) {
    df <- df %>%
      mutate(is_reuse = as.integer(submitted_equals_any_cached_solution))
  }

  df <- df %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[y_col]]),
      !is.na(is_reuse),
      !is.na(.data[[group_col]])
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      subject_idx = factor(.data[[group_col]])
    )

  fixed_formula_target <- "is_reuse"
  fixed_formula_null <- "1"

  if (random_slope_target) {
    random_spec_target <- paste0("(1 + is_reuse || ", group_col, ")")
  } else {
    random_spec_target <- paste0("(1 | ", group_col, ")")
  }

  random_spec_null <- paste0("(1 | ", group_col, ")")

  cat("\n", strrep("=", 90), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("No-reveal-count LME CV:", y_col, "\n")
  cat(strrep("=", 90), "\n", sep = "")

  cat("Target fixed formula: ", fixed_formula_target, "\n")
  cat("Target random spec:   ", random_spec_target, "\n")
  cat("Null fixed formula:   ", fixed_formula_null, "\n")
  cat("Null random spec:     ", random_spec_null, "\n")
  cat("CV settings: between-participant grouped K-fold; K = ", K,
      ", seed = ", seed, ", loss = MSE\n", sep = "")
  cat("N rows after dropna:", nrow(df), "\n")
  cat("N subjects:", n_distinct(df[[group_col]]), "\n")

  # ------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Target model
  # ------------------------------------------------------------------

  cv_target <- cv_lme_group_kfold(
    df = df,
    response = y_col,
    group = group_col,
    fixed_formula = fixed_formula_target,
    random_spec = random_spec_target,
    K = K,
    seed = seed,
    optimizer = optimizer
  )

  # ------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Null model
  # ------------------------------------------------------------------

  cv_null <- cv_lme_group_kfold(
    df = df,
    response = y_col,
    group = group_col,
    fixed_formula = fixed_formula_null,
    random_spec = random_spec_null,
    K = K,
    seed = seed,
    optimizer = optimizer
  )

  cat("\n--- Target model ---\n")
  print(summary(cv_target$fit_full))

  cat("\n--- Null model ---\n")
  print(summary(cv_null$fit_full))

  cat("\n--- In-sample information criteria ---\n")
  cat(sprintf("AIC target: %.2f\n", AIC(cv_target$fit_full)))
  cat(sprintf("AIC null:   %.2f\n", AIC(cv_null$fit_full)))
  cat(sprintf(
    "Delta AIC null - target: %.2f\n",
    AIC(cv_null$fit_full) - AIC(cv_target$fit_full)
  ))

  cat(sprintf("BIC target: %.2f\n", BIC(cv_target$fit_full)))
  cat(sprintf("BIC null:   %.2f\n", BIC(cv_null$fit_full)))
  cat(sprintf(
    "Delta BIC null - target: %.2f\n",
    BIC(cv_null$fit_full) - BIC(cv_target$fit_full)
  ))

  # ------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Compare fold-level CV MSE
  # ------------------------------------------------------------------

  cv_compare <- cv_target$cv_table %>%
    select(
      fold,
      target_n_train = n_train,
      target_n_test = n_test,
      target_n_train_subjects = n_train_subjects,
      target_n_test_subjects = n_test_subjects,
      target_n_with_RE = n_with_RE,
      target_n_FE_only = n_FE_only,
      target_mse = test_mse
    ) %>%
    full_join(
      cv_null$cv_table %>%
        select(
          fold,
          null_n_train = n_train,
          null_n_test = n_test,
          null_n_train_subjects = n_train_subjects,
          null_n_test_subjects = n_test_subjects,
          null_n_with_RE = n_with_RE,
          null_n_FE_only = n_FE_only,
          null_mse = test_mse
        ),
      by = "fold"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      null_minus_target = null_mse - target_mse
    )

  cat("\n--- Fold-level CV losses ---\n")
  print(cv_compare)

  cat(sprintf("\nMean CV MSE target: %.6f\n", cv_target$cv_avg_mse))
  cat(sprintf("Mean CV MSE null:   %.6f\n", cv_null$cv_avg_mse))
  cat(sprintf(
    "Delta CV MSE null - target: %.6f\n",
    cv_null$cv_avg_mse - cv_target$cv_avg_mse
  ))

  valid_diff <- cv_compare$null_minus_target
  valid_diff <- valid_diff[!is.na(valid_diff)]

  if (length(valid_diff) >= 2) {
    cv_t <- t.test(valid_diff, mu = 0)

    cat(sprintf(
      "Fold-wise t-test on null - target MSE: t = %.4f, p = %.6g, n_folds = %d\n",
      unname(cv_t$statistic),
      cv_t$p.value,
      length(valid_diff)
    ))
  } else {
    cv_t <- NULL
    cat("Fold-wise t-test unavailable: too few valid folds.\n")
  }

  list(
    df_used = df,
    fixed_formula_target = fixed_formula_target,
    fixed_formula_null = fixed_formula_null,
    random_spec_target = random_spec_target,
    random_spec_null = random_spec_null,
    cv_target = cv_target,
    cv_null = cv_null,
    comparison = cv_compare,
    target_mean_mse = cv_target$cv_avg_mse,
    null_mean_mse = cv_null$cv_avg_mse,
    cv_ttest = cv_t
  )
}

```


```{r}
y_cols <- c(
  "submitted_path_reveal_spearman_abs",
  "submitted_path_reveal_kendall_abs",
  "submitted_path_reveal_mean_excess_jump_distance"
)

cv_results_by_metric_between_subj_no_count <- list()

for (y_col in y_cols) {
  cv_results_by_metric_between_subj_no_count[[y_col]] <- run_lme_no_reveal_count_cv(
    tmp = test_df,
    y_col = y_col,
    group_col = "subject_idx",
    K = 5,
    seed = 0,
    random_slope_target = TRUE,
    optimizer = "bobyqa"
  )
}

cv_summary_between_subj_no_count <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(cv_results_by_metric_between_subj_no_count), function(y_col) {
    cv <- cv_results_by_metric_between_subj_no_count[[y_col]]
    comp <- cv$comparison

    data.frame(
      metric = y_col,
      cv_type = "between_participant_grouped_5fold_no_reveal_count",

      target_mean_cv_mse = cv$target_mean_mse,
      null_mean_cv_mse = cv$null_mean_mse,
      null_minus_target = cv$null_mean_mse - cv$target_mean_mse,

      n_valid_folds = sum(!is.na(comp$null_minus_target)),

      mean_target_test_subjects = mean(comp$target_n_test_subjects, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_null_test_subjects = mean(comp$null_n_test_subjects, na.rm = TRUE),

      foldwise_t = ifelse(
        is.null(cv$cv_ttest),
        NA_real_,
        unname(cv$cv_ttest$statistic)
      ),
      foldwise_p = ifelse(
        is.null(cv$cv_ttest),
        NA_real_,
        cv$cv_ttest$p.value
      )
    )
  })
)

print(cv_summary_between_subj_no_count)
```
